svg.title: Closet three memory fragment (apartment four) - preserved travel
svg.desc: Looking straight into a tightly framed travel closet. The top shelf carries a hardshell suitcase laid flat with a small luggage tag, a tidy stack of folded jackets, and a soft duffel weekender with a small toiletries pouch on top. A hanging rod runs across the wall below the shelf with three hangers - a long charcoal coat, a cream jacket, a slate blazer - plus an olive backpack hung by its top strap. A small black hat hooks off the right wall and a long maroon scarf drapes from a small hook beside it. A low shoe rack along the bottom holds four pairs of muted shoes. Along the very floor, a thin warm strip of light bleeds in from beneath the closet door. A pair of slippers sits near the door and a folded carry tote leans on the opposite floor corner. Tiny dust on top of the luggage marks time that has passed without movement. Nothing animates.
